current.summary: Capability monitor pipeline: brainstorm + 5-round panel review complete (5/5 consensus), design doc updated with 40 panel changes, ready for plan writing

activeWork.description: Plan writing phase for capability monitor pipeline feature
activeWork.progress: Design doc (910 lines) panel-reviewed with 5/5 consensus (1 agree, 4 agree_with_reservations, 0 dissents), all 40 panel changes applied. Ready to dispatch plan-writing subagent to produce task chunks in ~8-10 phases.

recentDecisions: Architecture: syllago capmon subcommand with two-job CI split (fetch-extract with no permissions, report with write/pull-requests/issues)
Data layer: YAML with per-field source references for full traceability
Extraction: fully deterministic (gotreesitter + goquery + goldmark + go/parser)
Cursor handling: chromedp only for Cursor type, verified ~4sec performance
Sanitization: structured selector schema with expected_contains anchors
Panel consensus: 35 mandatory + 5 nice-to-have changes incorporated, zero dissents
nextSteps: Dispatch plan-writing subagent against docs/plans/2026-04-08-capability-monitor-pipeline-design.md to produce subagent-sized task chunks (~8-10 phases)
Run quality review subagent (10-point checklist: per-task granularity, dependencies, phase sequencing)
Run validation subagent for design-to-plan parity
Create beads: 1 epic + ~40-50 task beads with dependency wiring and Phase B blocker analysis
Execute: dispatch focused subagents per-task or per-phase cluster
Cleanup: delete two stray 0-byte files in repo root (', expected_contains: ' and ', min_results: <int | omit>, updated_at:')

context.notes: Design doc evolved 535 → 910 lines post-panel. Full review record at .develop/capmon-panel-bus.jsonl (26 messages, rounds 0-5). Feature state at .develop/state.json. Pending commit: 48+ new/modified files (design doc, panel bus, round backups). Two stray 0-byte files safe to delete—subagent heredoc artifacts from design update phase. No beads created this session (none needed during design/review phase).

previousSessions.summary: Capability monitor pipeline: brainstorm + 5-round panel review complete (5/5 consensus), design doc updated with 40 panel changes, ready for plan writing in next session
completedWork: Brainstorm phase: ~9 design questions resolved (capmon subcommand, twice-daily cron, YAML data layer with per-field refs, deterministic extraction via gotreesitter/goquery/goldmark/go-parser, chromedp for Cursor only)
5-round panel review: 26 messages from 5 panelists (remy, engineer, operator, maintainer, security) across rounds 0-5
Consensus reached: 5-of-5 vote to proceed (engineer: agree, others: agree_with_reservations), zero dissents
Design doc: updated with all 35 mandatory + 5 nice-to-have panel changes, grew from 535 to 910 lines, Panel Review Record section added
nextSteps: Dispatch plan-writing subagent against the panel-reviewed design at docs/plans/2026-04-08-capability-monitor-pipeline-design.md
Quality review subagent on generated plan
Create beads with dependency wiring and Phase B blocker analysis
Execution phase with per-task/per-phase focused subagents
